title: Time on the Water
description: You can collect Time on the Water staged badges when you take part in some water activities.

tips.title: Only certain water activities count towards this badge.
tips.details:
Taking part in the following activities counts towards the Time on the Water Staged Activity Badge:

- Kayaking
- Canoeing
- Stand-up paddle boarding
- Sailing
- Windsurfing
- Powerboating
- Kiteboarding
- Surfing
- Yachting
- Motorcruising
- Narrowboating
- Pulling or rowing
- White water rafting
- Traditional rafting
- Paddle boarding
- Water-skiing

tips.title: Water activities you've taken part in for previous stages of the badge can be counted towards your total as you move through the sections.
